checks.finding: T-001 Risk: high is consistent with scope: modifies the protected tamper-evidence gate scripts for all registered features; Risk Rationale and Security Boundaries name repo-wide silent-harm exposure; not over-classified since scope is live validator code, not UI/CSS/docs/test-only.

Done When includes 'Red->Green evidence recorded in the implementation report' and 'An independent quality-gate verdict records PASS with traceability and high-risk provenance'; Risk is high (not critical) so second-approver/signed-bundle items are correctly not required.

Scope = 3 areas (not >3); title is single-phase. Done When = 9 items but 5 map 1:1 to registered AC-001..AC-005 and 4 are risk-tier-mandated evidence bookkeeping rather than added implementation scope; design.md calls the change a 'Single-point change... No new components, files, or data flows.'

AC-002 (tamper negative controls incl. column-0-anchor false-positive guard) and AC-003 (CRLF / no-trailing-newline) provide edge-case/error-path coverage beyond AC-001's happy path, both reflected in T-001 Done When.

acceptance-tests.md TEST-001..TEST-005 each reference a specific AC-NNN in the Test ID/AC table; TEST-005 is explicitly marked 'NOT a shell-suite case' (gate-phase evidence), avoiding a type mismatch.
tasks.md T-001 declares 'Rollback: human re-copies the prior check-workflow-state.{sh,ps1} from git history; revert the test commit', matching infra-spec.md's Operational Notes.
tasks.md contains a single task (T-001); no second task exists to create an uncoordinated file-scope collision.
T-001 declares Depends On: none and Blockers: None; single-task file, no cross-task ordering to misalign.

T-001 fixes RT-20260712-003. Reproduction evidence: exact diagnostic string plus TEST-001 as the required RED anchor against pre-fix live twins. Diagnostic-before-fix ordering: Scope writes TEST-001..004 (RED) before the deletion-rule change. Regression evidence: Done When focused-suite/gate pass plus AC-001's GREEN outcome.
